title: Flashy Japanese YouTube Thumbnail
sourceTitle: Youtube Thumbnail Explosive Japanese X Monetization Thumbnail

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a flashy Japanese YouTube thumbnail in a high-impact anime marketing style, 16:9 landscape, packed with neon green energy effects, gold sparkles, speed lines, lens flares, and thick black drop shadows. The composition is split with bold promotional text dominating the left and center, and a cute chibi anime boy on the right pointing directly at the viewer with an enthusiastic smile. He has tousled dark brown hair with vivid {argument name="accent hair color" default="neon green"} streaks, large bright green eyes, soft blush on his cheeks, and wears a black hoodie layered with a green-trimmed jacket over an orange inner shirt. Use glossy cel-shaded rendering, crisp outlines, high contrast, and exaggerated depth for a clickable social-media-thumbnail look. At the very top, place a curved red ribbon banner with gold trim and a gift box icon on the left; inside the banner put the Japanese headline text {argument name="top banner text" default="無料10大特典プレゼント"} in bold white and yellow lettering. In the main center-left area, place huge Japanese text with dramatic 3D styling and metallic gradients: a giant gold "10", a white "日で", a massive neon green "X", then silver-white "収益化", and gold-orange "達成", reading exactly {argument name="main headline" default="10日でX収益化達成"}. Surround this headline with upward green arrows, starburst glints, and explosive light effects. Add 4 floating platform-style icons around the headline area: 1 pink social-like icon with a white heart, 1 blue speech-bubble icon with a white user silhouette, 1 tilted black smartphone displaying a white X logo, and 1 stack of gold coins with a yen symbol coin in front. Along the bottom, place 3 glowing green feature boxes aligned horizontally, each with a distinct icon and Japanese copy: box 1 has a beginner mark icon and text {argument name="feature text 1" default="X初心者でも簡単収益化"}, box 2 has a clock icon and text "1日1時間の作業でOK", box 3 has a calendar icon and text "最短10日で収益化条件達成". At the bottom right, add a large glossy red rounded call-to-action button with a white border glow, white Japanese text {argument name="button text" default="今すぐ受け取る"}, a white play triangle on the right side of the button, and a clicking hand cursor near the lower-right edge. The entire image should feel explosive, urgent, and optimized for high click-through rate, using saturated greens, reds, golds, black shadows, and metallic highlights.
